payment_methods.title: Payment Methods
payment_methods.description: Configure available payment methods for the shop. Drag to change display order.
payment_methods.pg_hint: * Additional payment methods will be automatically registered when PG plugins are installed.

bank_accounts.title: Bank Account Settings
bank_accounts.description: Configure bank account information for bank transfer payments.

auto_cancel.title: Auto Cancel Order
auto_cancel.description: Configure payment waiting period for bank transfer/virtual account payments.
auto_cancel.days_prefix: Orders with pending payment status will be auto-cancelled after
auto_cancel.hint: * Payment deadline is determined at the time of order.

cart_expiry.title: Cart Expiry
cart_expiry.description: Configure how long items stay in the cart.
cart_expiry.days_prefix: Cart items will be automatically deleted after

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Configure inventory deduction and restoration policies.
inventory.restore_description: Automatically restore deducted inventory when order is cancelled.
inventory.restore_label: Restore product inventory after order cancellation.
